label: Bundle Templates
description: Pre-built bundle template gallery with category badges, estimated cost/profit, and execution step preview.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: No mock imports in widget file.

0.6.note: Context is pure local state (no async fetch); no isLoading field.

0.7.note: Empty state present: hidden-gallery state and templates.length===0 guard with informative message.

0.8.note: Context has no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary handles render errors.

0.9.note: No dead code. readOnly from context disables template load buttons in batch mode.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass (0.6, 0.8 N/A for pure local-state context).

1.1.note: All data from useBundlesData() hook (templates, loadTemplate, showTemplates, setShowTemplates, steps, readOnly).

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope(); hasDefiDesk derived from organizationIds.

1.3.note: Org filter: hasDefiDesk filters FLASH_BORROW/FLASH_REPAY templates for orgs without a DeFi desk.

1.4.note: Template list is org-scoped; client sub-filtering not applicable for template gallery.

1.5.note: Template list is org-scoped; strategy sub-filtering not applicable for template gallery.

1.6.note: Empty org scope → hasDefiDesk=true → full template list returned.

1.7.note: BUNDLE_TEMPLATES fixture still in lib/mocks/fixtures/bundle-templates — context-level concern. Template reference config in lib/config/services/bundle.config is correct.

l1.notes: All checks pass. 1.4, 1.5 N/A. 1.7 partial: BUNDLE_TEMPLATES in lib/mocks/ (context-level debt, not widget-level).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live=full template loading; paper=full loading (testnet preview); batch=readOnly=true — template buttons disabled.

3.2.note: Context reads isBatch from useExecutionMode(); readOnly=isBatch propagated to widget.

3.3.note: Human verify: batch mode → template load buttons visually disabled.

3.4.note: Human verify: batch/as-of indicator visible in surrounding layout.

3.5.note: Paper mode: template loading enabled; loaded steps produce testnet gas estimates in context.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or setInterval in this widget or bundles context.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1, 3.2, 3.5, 3.6 complete. Human must verify 3.3, 3.4.

4.1.note: Template buttons call loadTemplate(template); show/hide buttons call setShowTemplates(). No empty or console-only handlers.

4.3.note: Human: verify template cards show name, category badge, cost/profit estimates, and step flow preview.

4.4.note: Human: click template → steps load in bundle-steps widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks inside widget render.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1, 4.2, 4.5, 4.6 pass. Human must complete 4.3, 4.4.

5.1.note: Target strategies: Flash Loan Arb (DeFi, FLASH_BORROW+SWAP+FLASH_REPAY template), Basis Trade (CeFi, multi-leg buy/sell), DeFi Deleverage (BORROW+SWAP+LEND template). Template gallery is the onboarding entry point for all bundle strategies.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors. Semantic classes (text-rose-400, text-emerald-400) are design-system sentiment colors.

7.2.note: No mock imports in widget file. BUNDLE_TEMPLATES accessed via context hook, not directly.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget file; no inline object/array literals in deps.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro), text-[9px] with text-nano (--text-nano), and text-[8px] with text-pico (--text-pico). Tokens landed in globals.css.

8.2.note: No arbitrary spacing values (p-[, m-[, gap-[).

8.3.note: Uses Button, Badge, CollapsibleSection, Separator from shared components/ui/*. Template cards use native <button> with type='button' (correct). No custom interactive divs.

8.4.note: No img without alt. No unlabeled inputs. Template buttons are native <button type='button'> with visible text content — accessible by default. No interactive divs.

8.5.note: Human: verify at minW=3, minH=3 — template card grid (sm:grid-cols-2) should compress to single column on small widget width.

keepSeparate.rationale: Template gallery is toggled on/off by the user (showTemplates flag). It's a distinct browsing surface separate from the editing surface (bundle-steps). Keeping separate allows independent resizing and the collapsed state UX.

relationships.notes: Drives bundle-steps by calling loadTemplate() which populates the steps array in BundlesDataContext. Master in the sense of initiating the bundle workflow.

dataContract.notes: BUNDLE_TEMPLATES currently sourced from lib/mocks/fixtures/bundle-templates.ts via context. In production, templates should be fetched from a bundle template API endpoint on-demand. Migration tracked as known issue.

gaps: BUNDLE_TEMPLATES fixture in lib/mocks/ should migrate to lib/config/ or backend API (L1.7 partial)
Template search/filter not implemented for large template sets
No template preview modal — only inline step badge strip
coverage.notes: Template gallery covers DeFi, CeFi, Sports, Options categories per fixture data. Coverage verification depends on production template API providing the same breadth.

knownIssues: BUNDLE_TEMPLATES fixture still in lib/mocks/fixtures/bundle-templates — should migrate to lib/config/ or lib/constants/ (context-level fix, not widget-level)

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: bundle-templates-widget.tsx — text-[10px] at lines 21,45,62,69,87; text-[9px] at line 58; text-[8px] at line 75. No tailwind token for sub-xs sizes.
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro 0.625rem), text-[9px] with text-nano (--text-nano 0.5625rem), and text-[8px] with text-pico (--text-pico 0.5rem) (2026-04-21)
